channel.title: FactQuire
channel.description: Source-verified LLM API fact changes and news.

item.title: AWS quietly doubled Bedrock prices for legacy Claude models — and cost trackers haven't caught up
item.description: Amazon Bedrock's 'Public Extended Access' pricing, effective December 1, 2025, doubled per-token prices for Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2. Seven months later, at least one widely used open-source cost tracker still carried the old prices — we verified against the primary source and submitted the fix.

item.title: A facts wire for the model economy: why we exist
item.description: Software is making purchasing decisions about AI models using unverified data. We built a source-verified feed — every number quoted from a primary source, independently reviewed before publishing.

item.title: FactQuire v0.2: External dataset audit self-correction: Gemini 2.5 Flash exact context limit
item.description: External dataset audit self-correction: Gemini 2.5 Flash exact context limit

item.title: FactQuire v0.1: Initial dataset: 40 models across 7 providers
